case_title: YP ADVERTISING LP VS. AUGUSTO BASILIO et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YP ADVERTISING LP
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YP ADVERTISING LP ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT BASILIO, AUGUSTO
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-28-2014 CONTINUED TO MAR-03-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-03-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YP ADVERTISING LP AS TO DEFENDANT BASILIO, AUGUSTO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-06-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-05-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-22-2013
DECLARATION OF BRIAN S. HEALY IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIP FILED BY PLAINTIFF YP ADVERTISING LP
FIRST AMENTMENT OT STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YP ADVERTISING LP
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JAN-28-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. FEB-06-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YP ADVERTISING LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BASILIO, AUGUSTO $36,530.70 PRINCIPAL, $4,310.00 INTEREST, $900.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $41,740.70, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
